46719c30-f4c3-4cad-be07-d5cb21eee6bb.ground_truth: Mapping Human Oriented Information to Software Agents for Online Systems Usage
annotator_steps: Search for the paper 'Pie Menus or Linear Menus, Which Is Better?'.
Open the paper page and inspect the authors.
Identify which author had authored prior papers.
Search for that author's publication history.
Open the author's publications page.
Find the earliest paper authored by that person.
Return the title of that first paper.
Search for the official script for Doctor Who Series 9 Episode 11.
Open the BBC-hosted script PDF.
Locate the first scene heading.
Extract the setting exactly as written.
Return THE CASTLE.
Open the Secret Santa document.
Match each gift to a recipient interest.
Determine which recipient did not receive a gift.
Determine who was supposed to give that recipient a gift.
Return Fred.
Count the attending adults.
Count the attending children.
Exclude the second cousins who do not eat carbs.
Compute total potatoes needed for adults and remaining children.
Convert potatoes to pounds.
Convert pounds to 5-pound bags and round up.
Return 2.
Open Bielefeld University Library's BASE.
Browse to DDC 633.
Filter to unknown language items before 2020.
Identify the article whose flag is unique from the others.
Read the country from the institution information.
Return Guatemala.
